title: Prepare for the Naturalization Interview and Test | USCIS
content:
## Prepare for the Naturalization Interview and Test
Resources on this page can help you prepare students for the naturalization interview and test. It includes educational resources specific to each section of the test. The links below will direct you to resources specific to each section of the test:

#### Interview and Speaking Test Resources
Use this resource to help citizenship students prepare for the naturalization eligibility interview (a review of Form N-400, Application for Naturalization  (PDF, 758.05 KB) ), which also serves as the speaking test.
- Understanding Commands for the Naturalization Interview for Teachers: Classroom Materials  (PDF, 6.38 MB)

#### Civics Test Resources
Use these resources to prepare citizenship students for the civics portion of the naturalization test.
- 128 Civics Questions and Answers for the 2025 Civics Test
- One Nation, One People: The USCIS 2025 Civics Test Study Guide
- Civics Flash Cards for the Naturalization Test ( English  (PDF, 33.71 MB) , Spanish  (PDF, 33.36 MB) ) ( cut-out versions are available)
- Preparing for Naturalization Test: A Pocket Study Guide  (PDF, 371.91 KB)
- Preparing for Naturalization Test: A Pocket Study Guide  (PDF, 367.92 KB) (Spanish)
- 100 Civics Questions with MP3 Audio-English Version
- 100 Civics Questions with MP3 Audio-Spanish Version
- Civics Practice Test
- Learn About the United States: Quick Civics Lessons  (PDF, 8.93 MB)
- Preparing for the Oath: U.S. History and Civics for Citizenship
- Famous Americans on the Civics Test  (PDF, 1.15 MB)
- The Citizen’s Almanac  (PDF, 8.53 MB)
- Pocket-size Declaration of Independence and Constitution of the United States  (PDF, 1.24 MB)

#### Resources for the Reading and Writing Tests
Use these resources to prepare citizenship students for the reading and writing portions of the naturalization test.
- Reading Test Vocabulary List  (PDF, 184.75 KB)
- Writing Test Vocabulary List  (PDF, 181.5 KB)
